source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Which of the following is true of the reactions shown in the diagram above?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The reaction is exothermic because the reactants are at a higher energy level than the products.

choice_map.A: The reaction is endothermic because the reactants are at a higher energy level than the products.
choice_map.B: The reaction is endothermic because the reactants are at a lower energy level than the products.
choice_map.C: The reaction is exothermic because the reactants are at a higher energy level than the products.
choice_map.D: The reaction is exothermic because the reactants are at a lower energy level than the products.
choice_map.E: The reaction is endothermic because the reactants are at the same energy level as the products.
